## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] feat — new user-visible feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no behavior change
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] build / ci — build, release, or CI changes
- [ ] chore — other

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is silent
- [ ] `go build ./...` succeeds
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] README / SECURITY.md / PRIVACY.md updated if user-visible behavior, new network destination, or new file written changed
- [ ] No unrelated reformatting / renaming

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything that would help review: design choices, alternatives considered, manual test steps. -->
